zh.Old Malton, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾笛卡爾 馬爾頓
zh.Stokesley, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾斯托可斯利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjory Eure於大約1415年出生在英國越可爾笛卡爾 馬爾頓時，她的父親Sir William Eure30歲，母親Maude FitzHugh22歲。她於1433年2月2日與Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn在英國達勒姆索可本結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1470年3月16日在英國達勒姆索可本享年56歲。

zh-hans.Old Malton, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾笛卡爾 馬爾頓
zh-hans.Stokesley, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾斯托可斯利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marjory Eure于大约1415年出生在英国越可爾笛卡爾 馬爾頓时，她的父亲Sir William Eure30岁，母亲Maude FitzHugh22岁。她于1433年2月2日与Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn在英国達勒姆索可本结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1470年3月16日在英国達勒姆索可本享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eure
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ewer
meanings: English (Hertfordshire, Middlesex, and Buckinghamshire): occupational name from Middle English ewere, a shortened form of ewerer ‘servant who supplied guests at the table with water to wash their hands’. The word ewerer is itself a derivative of Old French and Middle English ewer ‘water pitcher’, also recorded in Middle English as ower. Compare Lower .

nameMeanings.name: Marjory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjory Eure was born about 1415, in Old Malton, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir William Eure, was 30 and her mother, Maude FitzHugh, was 22. She married Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn on 2 February 1433, in Sockburn, Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 16 March 1470, in Sockburn, Durham, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjory Eure est née environ 1415, à Old Malton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Eure, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Maude FitzHugh, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn le 2 février 1433, à Sockburn, Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 mars 1470, à Sockburn, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marjory Eure um 1415 in Old Malton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Eure 30 und ihre Mutter Maude FitzHugh 22. Sie hat am 2. Februar 1433 in Sockburn, Durham, England Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. März 1470 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Sockburn, Durham, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marjory Eure è nata il circa 1415 nel Old Malton, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir William Eure, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Maude FitzHugh, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn il 2 febbraio 1433, nel Sockburn, Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 16 marzo 1470, nel Sockburn, Durham, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.Nottinghamshire, England: イギリスノッティンガムシュアイア
ja.Old Malton, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアオルド マルトン
ja.Stokesley, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアストケスリー
ja.of Sockburne, Durham, England: イギリスイギリスダルハム
ja.Sockburn, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Marjory Eureが約1415年にイギリスヨークシュアイアオルド マルトンで生まれた時，父Sir William Eureは30歳，母Maude FitzHughは22歳であった。1433年2月2日にイギリスダルハムソクブルンでSir Christopher Conyers of Sockburnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1470年3月16日にイギリスダルハムソクブルンで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marjory Eure(이)가 대략 1415년 영국 요르크실르 드 맬턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Eure(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maude FitzHugh(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1433년 2월 2일 영국 뒤람 속번에서 Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1470년 3월 16일 영국 뒤람 속번에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marjory Eure nasceu aproximadamente 1415, em Old Malton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Eure, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Maude FitzHugh, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn em 2 de fevereiro de 1433, em Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de março de 1470, em Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjory Eure родилась около 1415 г. в местности олд малтон, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Eure было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Maude FitzHugh, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn 2 февраля 1433 г. в местности соккбурн, дурам, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 16 марта 1470 г. в местности соккбурн, дурам, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marjory Eure nació aproximadamente 1415, en Old Malton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Eure, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Maude FitzHugh, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir Christopher Conyers of Sockburn el 2 de febrero de 1433, en Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 16 de marzo de 1470, en Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
